analytics.last_inbound_snippet: I canceled my website with you weeks.Ago and told you to remove it from my google profile, and you readdit it again today.So I am canceling all services with you now

cause_analysis.narrative: Body Sculpt Skin Laser Weight Loss and Wellness churned on 2026-02-02 after 204 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 66 times, but the client only replied 21. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

With Groupon, you're attracting customers whose primary motivation is the discount, not your expertise or services. These clients are less likely to rebook at full price, which means your return on investment takes a hit. A Zoca landing page, on the other hand, captures people who are actively searching for your servic…

Groupon customers tend to leave more negative reviews. Why? Because their expectations are shaped by the discount and not the true value of your service. That one-star review from a bargain hunter can hurt your visibility and credibility far more than the short-term revenue is worth.
